pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11, failing to utilize Java 17 features or potentially causing incompatibilities with libraries requiring Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is deprecated/removed in newer Jakarta EE versions; code importing javax.annotation.* will fail to compile or run if the dependency is missing or if the runtime expects jakarta.*.

src/main/java/s08/Checker2.java.general_idea: Annotate serialVersionUID field with @Serial to comply with Java 17 serialization rules.
src/main/java/s08/Checker2.java.why_exists: Java 17 enforces that serialVersionUID fields must be annotated with @Serial to avoid warnings or errors depending on compiler settings.

src/main/java/s19/Loops.java.general_idea: Add import for java.io.Serial annotation required for serializable fields in Java 17.
src/main/java/s19/Loops.java.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is a new API in Java 17; without the import, the code fails to compile if the annotation is used.

src/main/java/s19/Loops.java.general_idea: Add import for ThreadLocalRandom to support the new random number generation logic.
src/main/java/s19/Loops.java.why_exists: ThreadLocalRandom is used in the code; without the import, the code fails to compile.
